title: Fortuna City
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Fortuna City''' was the [[Capital/Legends|capital]] [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Edan II/Legends|Edan II]]. A battle between the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] took place there.

==Behind the scenes==
In the Adventure Book introduction of the ''[[Introductory Adventure Game]]'', Fortuna City was referred to as "New East Bay."

There is a real [[Wikipedia:Fortuna, California|Fortuna City]] located in California.

==Appearances==
*''[[Introductory Adventure Game]]''
